paper_title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces pre-normalization, SwiGLU activation, and rotary positional embeddings for improved training stability and performance. Achieves competitive performance with fewer parameters compared to larger proprietary models.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CommonCrawl, C4, Wikipedia, Books, ArXiv, Stack Exchange, GitHub
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, question answering, reasoning, code generation, and instruction-following tasks.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (licensed under Meta’s Llama license)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, efficient foundation language models with competitive performance across benchmarks using publicly available data.
raw_extraction.extension: Efficient implementation of causal multi-head attention reduces memory usage and runtime through techniques like gradient checkpointing and sequence parallelism.
raw_extraction.paper_title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces pre-normalization, SwiGLU activation, and rotary positional embeddings for improved training stability and performance. Outperforms GPT-3 (175B) on most benchmarks despite being 10× smaller.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CommonCrawl, C4, Wikipedia, Books, ArXiv, Stack Exchange, GitHub
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, question answering, reasoning, code generation, and instruction-following tasks.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (licensed under Meta’s Llama license)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, efficient foundation language models with competitive performance across benchmarks using publicly available data.
raw_extraction.extension: Efficient implementation of causal multi-head attention reduces memory usage and runtime through techniques like gradient checkpointing and sequence parallelism.
raw_extraction.paper_title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces pre-normalization, SwiGLU activation, and rotary positional embeddings for improved training stability and performance. Demonstrates strong performance on complex reasoning tasks and code generation.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CommonCrawl, C4, Wikipedia, Books, ArXiv, Stack Exchange, GitHub
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, question answering, reasoning, code generation, and instruction-following tasks.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (licensed under Meta’s Llama license)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, efficient foundation language models with competitive performance across benchmarks using publicly available data.
raw_extraction.extension: Efficient implementation of causal multi-head attention reduces memory usage and runtime through techniques like gradient checkpointing and sequence parallelism.
raw_extraction.paper_title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces pre-normalization, SwiGLU activation, and rotary positional embeddings for improved training stability and performance. Competitive with PaLM-540B and Chinchilla-70B on most benchmarks.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CommonCrawl, C4, Wikipedia, Books, ArXiv, Stack Exchange, GitHub
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, question answering, reasoning, code generation, and instruction-following tasks.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (licensed under Meta’s Llama license)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, efficient foundation language models with competitive performance across benchmarks using publicly available data.
raw_extraction.extension: Efficient implementation of causal multi-head attention reduces memory usage and runtime through techniques like gradient checkpointing and sequence parallelism.
raw_extraction.paper_title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces open-source large language models with efficient training techniques, including data filtering, mixed precision training, and parallelization strategies to scale to 7B parameters.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Common Crawl + publicly available datasets (e.g., GitHub, Wikipedia)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, text generation, instruction-following, and multilingual support
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, efficient, and open-access large language model development
raw_extraction.paper_title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of LLaMA Base with increased model capacity (13B parameters) while maintaining efficiency through similar training methodologies.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Common Crawl + publicly available datasets (e.g., GitHub, Wikipedia)
raw_extraction.application: Advanced language understanding, complex reasoning, and specialized instruction-following tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, efficient, and open-access large language model development
raw_extraction.paper_title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Instruction fine-tuning of LLaMA-65B to enhance its ability to follow user instructions, generate coherent responses, and perform complex reasoning tasks in conversational settings.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Common Crawl + publicly available datasets (e.g., GitHub, Wikipedia)
raw_extraction.application: Conversational AI, instruction-following, and interactive applications requiring contextual understanding
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling large language models to effectively follow human instructions and perform task-specific reasoning
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning with supervised fine-tuning on instruction-following datasets (e.g., Alpaca, Stanford HHA)
